еvening.line: Early еvening, the pink ring swallows
stanza: Early еvening, the pink ring swallows
The sphеrical marigold terrain
Sleepily, Venus sinks and hollows
The stationed headlight of a plane
*ticking clocks*
*clocks ringing*
*ticking clocks*
*clocks ringing*

*laughter*.linePrev: I'll see you on the dark side of the moon
*laughter*.line: The lunatic is in my head (*laughter*)
*laughter*.lineNext: The lunatic is in my head
stanza: The lunatic is in my head (*laughter*)
The lunatic is in my head
You raise the blade, you make the change
You rearrange me 'till I'm sane
You lock the door and throw away the key
And there's someone in my head, but it's not me

*laughter*.linePrev: I can't think of anything to say except...
stanza: I can't think of anything to say except...
*laughter*
I think it's marvellous!
*laughter*

4h.lineNext: The things I brought you when I found out
stanza: Goldenrod and the 4H stone
The things I brought you when I found out
You had cancer of the bone
Your father cried on the telephone
And he drove his car into the Navy yard
Just to prove that he was sorry
